steps.title: Convert 10% to a fraction
steps.content: We need to find 10% of 330 bean pods. Converting to a fraction: 10% = $\frac{1}{10}$.

steps.title: Divide by 10
steps.content:
To find $\frac{1}{10}$ of 330, we divide:
$$330 \div 10 = 33$$
Jasmin saved 33 bean pods. That matches choice B — B is correct.
